one_time_description: Prior period adjustment to correct overstatement of deferred revenues related to St'at'imc (PC) 2011 Trust funding recognition timing
economic_notes: Nation receives gaming revenue sharing from BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership. Has nominal interest in BC FN GRS GP Ltd. and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership. Skatin Nations Treaty Resource Inc. is a 100% owned subsidiary. 1020376 B.C. Ltd. held at 33.3% interest. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain impact.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to verify existence, completeness and valuation of tangible capital assets at historical cost. Prior period adjustment of $2,468,891 restated 2019 figures to correct overstatement of deferred revenues related to St'at'imc (PC) 2011 Trust. Restricted cash on balance sheet ($194,678) differs from cash flow statement representation ($306,177) due to inclusion of Ottawa Trust in cash flow reconciliation. Skatin Nations Treaty Resource Inc. consolidated using modified equity method. Wages and benefits from expenses by object used for salaries total. No schedule of remuneration provided. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC funding, FNESC, CMHC, and St'at'imc Trust transfers. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
